operation.name: write_at_psmgr_setsockopt
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun cur_state () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun enc_xfrm_validated () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun role () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (and  (and  (=  (_ bv0 32) (concat  (select  cur_state (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  cur_state (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  cur_state (_ bv1 32) ) (select  cur_state (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) (=  (_ bv2 32) (concat  (select  role (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  role (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  role (_ bv1 32) ) (select  role (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (=  (_ bv0 32) (concat  (select  enc_xfrm_validated (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  enc_xfrm_validated (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  enc_xfrm_validated (_ bv1 32) ) (select  enc_xfrm_validated (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: psmgr_session.state stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs
assumptions: producer sets state without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
